mainEntity.name: How do you answer website visitors when no one is at the office?

acceptedAnswer.text: The 24/7 Web Concierge is an AI-powered chat widget on your existing site. It answers FAQs, captures contact details, and books appointments at 2 AM the same way it does at 2 PM, so a Gen-Z visitor who would never call you can still become a customer.

mainEntity.name: Does the 24/7 Web Concierge work on my current website?

step.name: Trigger on completion
step.text: When a job is marked complete in your CRM (or by a manual trigger), the review flow starts.

step.name: Quick check-in
step.text: The AI calls or texts and asks one question: how did it go.

step.name: Route by sentiment
step.text: Happy customers get a one-tap Google review link. Unhappy customers route to a private feedback path so you can fix the issue before it becomes a public review.

step.name: Track every request
step.text: Easy CRM logs which customers were asked, how they responded, and how many reviews you actually earned.

mainEntity.name: How do you get more Google reviews without asking awkwardly?

acceptedAnswer.text: Hands-Off Reviews calls or texts your customer after the job is done, asks how it went, and — if they say it went well — sends them a one-tap link to leave a Google review. The whole conversation runs without your team chasing it.

mainEntity.name: Is this against Google's review policy?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Google explicitly allows asking customers for reviews. What is not allowed is gating reviews — hiding the link from unhappy customers entirely. We route unhappy customers to a private feedback path that does NOT block them from leaving a public review if they want to.

mainEntity.name: When does the review request go out?

acceptedAnswer.text: We tune timing per industry. Some businesses get the best response within an hour of completion. Others do better the next day. We test and adjust.

mainEntity.name: Does this work for Facebook reviews and the BBB too?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We can route happy customers to whichever review platform matters most for your business.
